title: Whose soul was supposed to be in Unit 03
display_title: Whose soul was supposed to be in Unit 03
wikitext:
[]: Whose soul was supposed to be in Unit-03?             Quote Post by Drew » Wed Jul 28, 2010 2:37 am Hello, new member, so please bear with me if this has come up before, but my search didn't show any results. I was simply wondering if, had the test activation had gone successfully without Bardiel's involvement, who would Touji be synching with? IIRC, it was stated that the entire class was full of pilot candidates, so are we to believe that NERV declared him the Fourth Child, then proceeded to use their plot-serving "metaphysical biology" to raid his mother's buried remains for her soul to stick in Unit-03? I just find it a bit strange that so much is made of how difficult it is for the children to achieve substantial synchronization ratios in order to control the Eva effectively, that they would just get a new model and stick a randomly selected orphaned (or at least motherless) kid into the entry plug and expect any results.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Jul 28, 2010 3:12 am Ah, but they're NOT randomly selected candidates. Misato explicitly states that the 2-A kids are all fourth-level candidates, which means there's three more levels of candidates. These kids are the ones Nerv considers most likely to work. So yeah. It's his mom he's synching with.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 28, 2010 3:23 am A bit more of this discussion here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2663

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Wed Jul 28, 2010 12:31 pm If I remember correctly, Tsurumaki said "a Rei clone or something" in answer to this question. So, the writers probably don't care.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 28, 2010 2:38 pm Lucretius wrote: If I remember correctly, Tsurumaki said "a Rei clone or something" in answer to this question. So, the writers probably don't care.

[]: Whose soul was supposed to be in Unit-03?             Quote Post by Drew » Wed Jul 28, 2010 2:37 am Hello, new member, so please bear with me if this has come up before, but my search didn't show any results. I was simply wondering if, had the test activation had gone successfully without Bardiel's involvement, who would Touji be synching with? IIRC, it was stated that the entire class was full of pilot candidates, so are we to believe that NERV declared him the Fourth Child, then proceeded to use their plot-serving "metaphysical biology" to raid his mother's buried remains for her soul to stick in Unit-03? I just find it a bit strange that so much is made of how difficult it is for the children to achieve substantial synchronization ratios in order to control the Eva effectively, that they would just get a new model and stick a randomly selected orphaned (or at least motherless) kid into the entry plug and expect any results.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Jul 28, 2010 3:12 am Ah, but they're NOT randomly selected candidates. Misato explicitly states that the 2-A kids are all fourth-level candidates, which means there's three more levels of candidates. These kids are the ones Nerv considers most likely to work. So yeah. It's his mom he's synching with.
